---
title: "Projects"
description: "A comprehensive portfolio of data analysis, research, and software development projects."
page-label: "Visual"
page-band: true
categories: [R-cheatsheets]

page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
  id: projetcs
  contents: projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  date-format: "D MMM YYYY"
---
::: {#project-listing}
:::
